description: Legal document concerned with a case of slander. Location: Aleppo. Dated: Tishrei 1326 of the Seleucid Era (= 1014 CE). A notable was suspected of "having kept a Muslim boy" (ghulām). Mentions [...] b. Elḥanan and the refusal to accept siʿāya (work imposed on a slave for obtaining his freedom). Signed by at least 13 people, including: [...] b. Isaac, Avraham b. Yefet, Shabbat b. Nuʿmān, Shelomo b. Efrayim ha-Kohen, [... b. Ma]nṣūr and [... b.] Yefet. Below are jottings and pen exercises. (Information in part from Frenkel, CUDL, and Goitein's index card.) Same handwriting as T-S NS 324.79 (PGPID 25726).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
